Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-02 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker data shows two extreme outliers at the top of the ranking. PL dominates with a composite score of 96.8 and a stunning 906% one-year return, though its massive 12.08 ratio between 1-year and 3-month gains signals the momentum is severely overextended—the dashboard flags this explicitly. FSLY ranks second with a 415% one-year return and more balanced ratio progression (ranging from 1.26 to 6.9), suggesting more sustainable momentum structure, plus it shows a negative bad_spy_score of -0.1877, meaning it actually outperforms on down SPY days while PL struggles significantly in those conditions. Both pass all four SMA gates and beat SPY across multiple timeframes, but PL's outsized rally appears front-loaded to early periods while FSLY demonstrates steadier acceleration through the year. The contrast highlights that raw returns alone don't indicate momentum health—consistency and resilience matter as much as magnitude.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
